title: prunus × boehmeri
intro: Prunus × boehmeri, also known as Chinese plum, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Prunus mume and Prunus pseudocerasus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus × boehmeri include improving digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Prunus × boehmeri typically include dried flowers, bark, and fruit, which are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
